class.name: GDKUsers
class.brief_description: User management service accessed via GDK.users.
class.description: Manages Xbox user sign-in, identity, and user lifecycle. Add users with [method add_default_user_async] or [method add_user_with_ui_async]. The first successful sign-in establishes the session primary user; later user adds do not replace it.

method.name: add_default_user_async
method.description: Adds the default non-guest user silently. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the signed-in [GDKUser].

method.name: add_user_with_ui_async
method.description: Opens the system UI to add a user interactively, allowing guest selection when the platform offers it. This can add another local user, but it does not replace the session primary user once one has already been established. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the signed-in [GDKUser].

method.name: get_primary_user
method.description: Returns the session primary [GDKUser], or [code]null[/code] if no user is signed in. The first successful user add establishes this user for the session.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns an [Array] of all currently signed-in [GDKUser] objects.

method.name: check_privilege_async
method.description: Checks whether the [param user] has the specified [param privilege]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the privilege-check dictionary.

method.name: resolve_privilege_with_ui_async
method.description: Attempts to resolve the specified [param privilege] for the [param user] by showing system UI if needed. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the resolution payload.

method.name: resolve_issue_with_ui_async
method.description: Opens the system UI to resolve an account issue for the [param user]. Optionally pass a [param url] for a specific issue page. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the resolution payload.

method.name: get_gamer_picture_async
method.description: Retrieves the gamer picture for the [param user] at the specified [param size] (e.g., "small", "medium", "large"). Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the decoded [Image].

method.name: get_token_and_signature_async
method.description: Retrieves an Xbox Live token and signature for the specified [param user], HTTP [param method], and [param url]. Optionally provide [param headers], [param body], and [param force_refresh]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [GDKResult] data contains the token and signature dictionary.

signal.name: user_added
signal.description: Emitted when a new user has been added.

signal.name: user_removed
signal.description: Emitted when a user has been removed. The [param local_id] identifies the removed user.

signal.name: user_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a cached user's Xbox-facing state changes. [param change_kind] is one of [code]signed_in_again[/code], [code]gamertag[/code], [code]gamer_picture[/code], or [code]privileges[/code].

signal.name: primary_user_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the session primary user is first established or later cleared. Later user adds do not promote a different cached user to primary.
